items.title: Mediation Analysis Between Brain Age, Disease-Modifying Factors, and Disability and Cognitive Performance in Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: The brain-predicted age difference (brain-PAD) is considered a marker of neurodegeneration in people with multiple sclerosis (pwMS) and is associated with greater disability and cognitive impairment. However, the impact of disease-modifying factors (DMFs) on brain-PAD remains unknown, as does the extent to which their effect on disability and cognition is mediated through brain-PAD. The goal of this study was to investigate this in pwMS using a same-age cohort to eliminate calendar age as a confounding factor. Brain age was determined using brainageR from 3-dimensional T1-weighted MRI scans, and brain-PAD was calculated as the difference between predicted and chronological age. Disability was evaluated with the Expanded Disability Status Scale (EDSS), the 9-hole peg test (9HPT), and timed 25-foot walk test (T25FWT). Cognitive function was assessed using the Minimal Assessment of Cognitive Function in MS battery and converted to  The study included 117 healthy controls (mean age 52.8 ± 1.1 years, 74.3% female) and 242 pwMS (mean age 52.8 ± 0.9 years, 70.6% female), with a median disease duration of 15.2 years (interquartile range [IQR] 8.2-24.5) and a median EDSS score of 3.5 (IQR 2.5-4.0). Smoking (β = 0.20,  DMFs unrelated to MS, particularly smoking, alcohol use, and BMI at 18 years, accelerate brain aging. Brain-PAD mediates these effects and contributes to worsening disability and cognition, underscoring the potential of lifestyle interventions to mitigate neurodegeneration and preserve function in pwMS.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）患者における脳の予測年齢差（brain-PAD）は神経変性の指標であり、障害や認知機能低下と関連するが、疾患修飾因子（DMFs）がbrain-PADに与える影響や、DMFsの障害・認知機能への影響がbrain-PADを介しているかは不明であった。  
方法：同年齢のMS患者242名（平均年齢52.8歳）と健康対照117名を対象に、3次元T1強調MRIからbrainageRを用いて脳年齢を推定し、brain-PADを算出。障害はEDSS、9ホールペグテスト、25フィート歩行テストで評価し、認知機能はMS用簡易認知評価バッテリーで測定した。  
結果：喫煙、飲酒、18歳時のBMIなどMSに直接関連しないDMFsがbrain-PADを加速させ、brain-PADは障害と認知機能低下の進行を媒介することが示された。  
結論：生活習慣因子が脳の老化を促進し、これがMS患者の機能障害や認知低下に寄与しているため、生活習慣改善による神経変性の抑制と機能維持の可能性が示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症患者（pwMS）において、脳の予測年齢差（brain-PAD）は神経変性の指標であり、障害や認知機能低下と関連する。本研究は、同年齢コホートを用いて、喫煙や飲酒、若年時のBMIなどの疾患修飾因子（DMFs）がbrain-PADに与える影響と、それが障害・認知機能に及ぼす媒介効果を検証した。結果、これらの因子はbrain-PADを介して脳老化を促進し、機能悪化に寄与することが示された。

items.title: Consensus Definitions of Disease Activity and Clinical Outcomes in Patients With Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyradiculoneuropathy.
items.abstract: Key terms describing the activity status and clinical outcomes of chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyradiculoneuropathy (CIDP) lack standardized definitions. To address the need for uniform definitions, we sought to develop formal consensus-based terminology to define key aspects pertinent to the management of CIDP. In April 2025, the GBS|CIDP Foundation International convened a Task Force of 17 international CIDP experts, 2 guest experts from related specialties, and 3 patient representatives. Task Force panels iteratively reviewed, discussed, and voted on proposed definitions for No Evidence of Disease Activity, Relapse, Response, Refractory, Remission, and Residual Symptoms. Relevant literature was reviewed to inform each definition. A modified Delphi approach was used to achieve consensus, defined as a median rating ≥7 on a 9-point scale with ≥80% agreement. Voting included 17 content experts and 3 patient representatives. Guest experts provided nonvoting input. Composite metrics incorporating disability, strength impairment, and patient perception were determined to provide the most sensitive and specific assessment of clinical change in CIDP. Using commonly used clinical outcome measures, including minimally clinically important differences where available, unique definitions were developed for each clinical term. Definitions for No Evidence of Disease Activity, Relapse, Response (minimal, partial, and optimal), Refractory, Remission, and Residual Symptoms were iteratively refined to integrate patient-reported experiences, standardized disability scores, and objective measures of strength impairment, ensuring that each term captured a multidimensional view of disease status. The development of consensus-based definitions for key clinical terms in CIDP addresses a longstanding gap in standardizing the assessment of disease activity and treatment outcomes. By combining patient-reported experiences with objective disability and strength measures, the Task Force created comprehensive definitions reflecting the patient experience. The iterative Delphi process ensured broad expert agreement while allowing patient perspectives to inform the terminology. These standardized definitions may improve consistent evaluations in clinical practice, facilitate communication among healthcare providers, and support more robust design and interpretation of clinical trials. Furthermore, the incorporation of composite metrics sensitive to meaningful clinical changes may enhance the ability to detect treatment effects and disease progression, ultimately promoting more precise and patient-centered management of CIDP.
items.summary_ja:
背景：慢性炎症性脱髄性多発根ニューロパチー（CIDP）の病勢や臨床転帰を示す用語には統一された定義がなく、管理における標準化が求められていた。  
方法：2025年4月にGBS|CIDP Foundation Internationalが、17名の国際的CIDP専門家、関連分野のゲスト専門家2名、患者代表3名からなるタスクフォースを結成。文献レビューと修正デルファイ法を用い、「疾患活動なし」「再発」「反応」「難治性」「寛解」「残存症状」などの定義案を繰り返し検討・投票し、合意形成を図った。  
結果：障害度、筋力低下、患者の主観的評価を組み合わせた複合指標がCIDPの臨床変化を最も敏感かつ特異的に評価できると判明。各用語の定義は患者報告や標準化された障害スコア、客観的筋力測定を統合し、多面的に病態を反映する形で確立された。  
結論：CIDPの主要臨床用語に関する合意定義の策定により、病勢評価と治療効果判定の標準化が達成された。患者視点と客観的指標の融合により、臨床現場での一貫した評価や医療者間の円滑な情報共有、臨床試験の設計・解釈の質向上が期待される。これにより、より精密で患者中心のCIDP管理が促進される。
items.summary_short_ja: 慢性炎症性脱髄性多発根ニューロパチー（CIDP）の病勢や臨床転帰を示す用語に統一定義がなかったため、国際専門家と患者代表によるタスクフォースが改訂型デルファイ法で合意形成を行った。患者報告、障害度、筋力低下の複合指標を用い、「無病勢証拠」「再発」「反応（最小・部分・最適）」「難治」「寛解」「残存症状」などの定義を確立。これにより臨床評価の標準化と治療効果検出の精度向上が期待される。

items.title: Multiple Sclerosis and Outpatient Physician Care in the Last Years of Life: A Population-Based Study.
items.abstract: Patients with multiple sclerosis (MS) require increasing health care support, particularly in the last year of life. Despite the benefits of palliative care in addressing symptom burden and improving quality of life, its integration into MS care remains inconsistent. This study aimed to characterize health care utilization and palliative care access among people with MS in the last years of life and to identify key factors associated with hospital death and receipt of palliative care. A retrospective cohort study was conducted using linked health administrative databases in Ontario, Canada. The cohort consisted of all decedents aged 18 years or older who died in Ontario between April 2016 and March 2020, and we compared health care utilization in decedents with MS to the rest of the cohort. The identification of MS cases was based on a validated algorithm. Demographics, health care utilization, palliative care involvement, and medical interventions were analyzed. Predictors of palliative care receipt and hospital deaths were evaluated using multivariable logistic regression models. MS decedents (n = 1,975; mean age 68 years; 66.4% female) were younger and had fewer comorbidities than non-MS decedents (n = 500,904; mean age 77). High percentage of MS decedents had outpatient neurology visits in the last 5 years of life (49.4%) but a steep decline closer to death (2.7% in the last month). Palliative care use was similar (58.0% vs 56.9%) but occurred earlier in MS (61.9% vs 59.6% in the last 5 years). Multivariable regression showed that rural residence was associated with increased odds of hospital death (odds ratio [OR] 1.81, 95% CI 1.21-2.70) and lower odds of receiving palliative care (OR 0.74, 95% CI 0.55-0.99), while receiving palliative care within the last 5 years of life reduced the odds of hospital death (OR 0.47, 95% CI 0.37-0.60). Higher comorbidity and increased outpatient visits to urology were associated with a greater odd of receiving palliative care (OR 3.64, 95% CI 2.50-5.29 and OR 1.47, 95% CI 1.20-1.80). Although palliative care receipt was comparable between MS and non-MS decedents, rural disparities and high hospital deaths persist. Earlier palliative integration, particularly through neuropalliative care, could improve quality of life and reduce hospitalizations.
items.summary_ja: 本研究は、多発性硬化症（MS）患者の終末期における外来医療利用と緩和ケアの実態を明らかにすることを目的とした。カナダ・オンタリオ州の死亡者データベースを用いた後ろ向きコホート研究で、2016～2020年に死亡した18歳以上のMS患者（n=1,975）と非MS患者（n=500,904）を比較した。MS患者は非MS患者より若年で併存疾患が少なく、終末期5年間の神経科外来受診率は高かったが、死の直前1か月は急激に減少した。緩和ケアの利用率は両群でほぼ同等だったが、MS患者ではより早期に開始されていた。多変量解析では、農村部居住が病院死のリスク増加（OR 1.81）と緩和ケア受診率低下（OR 0.74）に関連し、緩和ケア受診は病院死リスクを低減（OR 0.47）した。併存疾患の多さや泌尿器科外来受診増加も緩和ケア受診と関連した。結論として、MS患者の緩和ケア受診率は非MS患者と同等だが、農村部の格差や高い病院死率が残存しており、神経緩和ケアを含む早期の緩和ケア統合が生活の質向上と入院減少に寄与すると示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症（MS）患者は終末期に医療支援が増加するが、緩和ケアの導入は一貫していない。本研究はカナダ・オンタリオ州の死亡者データを用い、MS患者の終末期の外来受診や緩和ケア利用を分析。MS患者は非MS患者より若年で外来神経科受診が多いが死期が近づくと減少。緩和ケア利用率は同等だが、農村部では病院死が多く緩和ケア利用が少ない。早期の神経緩和ケア導入が生活の質向上と入院減少に有効と示唆された。

items.title: Differences in Income Growth Between People With Multiple Sclerosis and Controls: A Norwegian Cohort Study.
items.abstract: The aim of this study was to determine if people with MS (pwMS) experience a different income development from controls, and if so, at what age, and at what time in the disease course. We examined income development for pwMS compared to matched controls in a Norwegian cohort. We assessed the impact of both age and time from diagnosis on income using linear mixed-effects models. Men with MS (mwMS) had, on average, a lower income trajectory compared to controls at an earlier age than women with MS (wwMS) (49 vs. 55 years). For men, the gap was increasing throughout the entire working age, while women were catching up with their controls close to retirement age. Although the absolute difference from controls is larger for mwMS than wwMS from age 50, the difference between the sexes is only statistically significant from age 60. The income increase rate was lower for both mwMS and wwMS compared to controls after being diagnosed with MS. For mwMS, the difference is evident 2 years after diagnosis, and for wwMS, 5 years after diagnosis. The average income loss experienced by mwMS was double that of women from 6 years after diagnosis, but the difference was not statistically significant when comparing the sexes. PwMS have lower income development than controls. Men lose income earlier in life and earlier in the disease course than women.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）患者の収入推移が健常者と異なるか、その差が生じる年齢や病気の経過時期を明らかにすることを目的とした。  
方法：ノルウェーのコホートを用い、MS患者（pwMS）と年齢・性別でマッチした対照群の収入推移を比較。年齢および診断からの経過時間が収入に与える影響を線形混合効果モデルで解析した。  
結果：男性MS患者（mwMS）は女性MS患者（wwMS）よりも早い49歳で対照群との収入差が生じ、女性は55歳で差が現れた。男性は労働年齢全体で収入差が拡大し続けたが、女性は退職年齢に近づくにつれ対照群に追いつく傾向があった。診断後の収入増加率は男女とも対照群より低く、男性は診断後2年、女性は5年で差が明確になった。診断後6年以降、男性の収入減少は女性の約2倍であったが、性差の統計的有意性は確認されなかった。  
結論：MS患者は健常者に比べ収入の伸びが低く、男性は女性よりも早期に収入減少が始まることが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症（MS）患者は対照群と比べて収入の伸びが低く、特に男性は女性よりも早い年齢（49歳）および診断後2年目から収入格差が拡大する。一方、女性は収入差が遅れて現れ、退職年齢に近づくと対照群に追いつく傾向がある。男性の収入減少は女性の約2倍だが、性差の統計的有意性は限定的である。

items.title: Use of High-Efficacy Therapy in Children With Multiple Sclerosis to Prevent Long-Term Disability.
items.abstract: Children with multiple sclerosis (MS) are increasingly treated with high-efficacy monoclonal antibody therapies; however, treatment approaches vary widely, largely because of regulatory restrictions that often delay access until adulthood. We hypothesized that initiating these therapies during childhood confers greater benefits than their initiation in adulthood. This study, therefore, evaluated long-term disability in patients with pediatric-onset MS treated with monoclonal antibodies before age 18 compared with those who initiated these therapies in adulthood. In this retrospective cohort study, patients younger than 18 years at the onset of MS symptoms were identified across 3 MS registries: MSBase, Observatoire Français de la Sclérose en Plaques, and the Italian MS Register. We categorized patients who commenced natalizumab, ocrelizumab, or rituximab between ages 12 and 17 into the pediatric high-efficacy therapy (HET) initiation group and those who began treatment between ages 20 and 22 into the adult HET initiation group. A landmark study design was used, with age 18 designated as the baseline and the outcome period spanning ages 23-27 years. The primary outcome was the change in Expanded Disability Status Scale (EDSS) scores, evaluated using a Bayesian weighted generalized linear mixed model. We included 277 patients (72% female), with a mean (SD) age at onset of MS symptoms of 14.97 (2.23) years. Of these, 108 initiated HET during childhood and 169 during adulthood. The postbaseline increase in EDSS scores was 0.53 steps lower in the pediatric HET initiation group compared with the adult group (β -0.53 [95% credible interval -0.87 to -0.19]). This benefit of pediatric HET initiation was most pronounced within the EDSS range of 4.5-6.0, with up to a 97% reduction in the odds of further disability worsening (odds ratio of EDSS score 5.0 over 4.5: 0.03 [95% credible interval 0.003-0.22]). Commencing high-efficacy monoclonal antibody therapy in childhood is associated with more favorable long-term disability outcomes than delayed initiation in adulthood. Early use of highly effective therapy is crucial for preserving neurologic function in children with MS. This study provides Class II evidence that, in children aged 12-17 years with MS, initiating therapy with monoclonal antibodies before age 18 (vs 20-22) is associated with less disability accrual between the ages of 23 and 27.
items.summary_ja:
背景：小児期発症多発性硬化症（MS）患者に対する高効力モノクローナル抗体療法の使用が増加しているが、規制の影響で成人になるまで治療開始が遅れることが多い。  
方法：MSBase、フランスおよびイタリアのMS登録データベースから、12～17歳で高効力療法（ナタリズマブ、オクレリズマブ、リツキシマブ）を開始した小児群と、20～22歳で開始した成人群を抽出。18歳を基準点とし、23～27歳時の障害度（EDSSスコア）の変化をベイズ加重一般化線形混合モデルで比較した。  
結果：277例（女性72％、平均発症年齢約15歳）中、108例が小児期に高効力療法を開始。小児群は成人群に比べ、EDSSスコアの増加が0.53ポイント少なく、特にEDSS4.5～6.0の範囲で障害進行のリスクが最大97％低減した。  
結論：小児期に高効力モノクローナル抗体療法を開始することは、成人開始に比べて長期的な障害進行を抑制し、神経機能の維持に有効である。早期治療開始の重要性を示すClass IIエビデンスを提供する。
items.summary_short_ja: 小児期に発症した多発性硬化症（MS）患者において、高効力モノクローナル抗体療法を18歳未満で開始した群は、成人期（20～22歳開始）に比べて長期的な障害進行（EDSSスコアの増加）が有意に抑制された。特に中等度の障害範囲（EDSS 4.5-6.0）での悪化リスクが最大97％減少し、早期治療開始が神経機能温存に重要であることを示した。

items.title: Differences in Use of Disease-Modifying Therapies Between Patients With Late-Onset and Adult-Onset Relapsing-Remitting Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: The therapeutic strategy for late-onset multiple sclerosis (LOMS) with a relapsing-remitting onset remains unclear, potentially leading to underexposure to disease-modifying therapies (DMTs) compared with adult-onset multiple sclerosis (AOMS). We investigated the differences in DMT use between LOMS and AOMS within the French MS registry at comparable levels of disease severity. This retrospective cohort study used data extracted in December 2024 from the French MS registry on patients with relapsing-remitting onset MS between 1997 and 2023. The primary outcome was the annual probability of receiving a DMT according to age at MS onset, adjusted for disease severity. Secondary outcomes included the annual probability of receiving a highly effective DMT (HEDMT), each DMT separately, having ≥1 EDSS measurement, having ≥1 brain MRI, and DMT initiations and discontinuations. We used a longitudinal logistic model with generalized estimating equations and an inverse-probability-of-censoring weighting. A total of 36,148 were included patients; 26,540 (73.4%) were female, mean age was 33.5 years (SD, 9.7), and 2,308 (6.4%) were aged ≥50 at disease onset. Median follow-up was 10.8 years (interquartile range, 5.6-17.0). Patients with LOMS had a lower annual probability of receiving a DMT compared with patients with AOMS (73.7% vs 83.1%; odds ratio [OR], 0.57 [95% CI 0.52-0.62]). The difference was greater for HEDMT (24.6% vs 44.4%; OR, 0.41 [95% CI 0.36-0.46]). Patients with LOMS were more likely to receive teriflunomide and less likely to receive fumarates, S1PR modulators, natalizumab, or anti-CD20. Clinical and radiologic follow-up did not differ significantly between patients with LOMS and AOMS. The rate of DMT initiation was lower in patients with LOMS (0.13 vs 0.17 initiation per patient-year). Although the proportions of DMT discontinuation were similar (59.7% vs 60.4%, excluding pregnancy-related discontinuations), these discontinuations were more often attributed to a complete discontinuation strategy (27.9% vs 22.3%) and less often to an escalation strategy (9.2% vs 13.8%) in patients with LOMS. At comparable levels of disease severity, patients with LOMS were less likely to be treated with DMTs, particularly HEDMT, than patients with AOMS. This gap was driven both by fewer DMT initiations and more frequent complete discontinuations.
items.summary_ja:
背景：再発寛解型多発性硬化症（MS）における遅発型発症（LOMS）の治療戦略は不明瞭で、成人発症（AOMS）と比べて疾患修飾療法（DMT）の使用が少ない可能性がある。  
方法：1997～2023年のフランスMS登録データ（36,148例）を用い、疾患重症度を調整した上でLOMS（発症年齢≥50歳）とAOMSのDMT使用状況を後ろ向きコホート研究で比較。主要評価項目は年ごとのDMT使用確率、二次評価項目に高効力DMT（HEDMT）使用率や検査頻度、DMT開始・中止率を含む。  
結果：LOMS患者はAOMS患者に比べDMT使用率が低く（73.7% vs 83.1%、OR 0.57）、特にHEDMT使用率の差が顕著（24.6% vs 44.4%、OR 0.41）。LOMSはテリフルノミド使用が多く、フマル酸塩やS1PR調節薬、ナタリズマブ、抗CD20療法は少なかった。臨床・画像フォローは両群で差がなかった。DMT開始率はLOMSで低く（0.13 vs 0.17）、中止率は類似もLOMSは完全中止が多く、増強中止は少なかった。  
結論：疾患重症度が同等でもLOMS患者はAOMS患者よりDMT、特にHEDMTの使用が少なく、これは開始率の低さと完全中止の多さによるものであった。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、再発寛解型多発性硬化症（MS）における遅発型（LOMS）と成人発症型（AOMS）患者の疾患修飾療法（DMT）使用の違いをフランスMS登録データで比較した。LOMS患者はAOMS患者に比べ、同程度の病状でもDMT特に高効果DMTの使用率が有意に低く、開始頻度も少なかった。中止は両群で同程度だが、LOMSでは完全中止が多く、治療強化は少なかった。

items.title: Clinical, Electrophysiological, and Neuropathological Features of Peripheral Neuropathies in People With T-Cell Lymphoproliferative Disorder.
items.abstract: Peripheral neuropathies (PNs) associated with T-cell lymphoproliferative disorders (T-Ly) are exceptionally rare and poorly characterized. Whether their mechanisms, clinical features, and outcome differ from PN associated with B-cell lymphoproliferative disorders (B-Ly) remains unclear. We aimed to characterize the clinical, electrophysiologic, and pathologic spectrum of T-Ly-associated PN, evaluate treatment responses, and compare these findings with B-Ly-associated PN. We conducted a retrospective multicentric cohort study across 17 PN reference centers in France and Switzerland. Adult patients with confirmed PN and T-Ly were included after exclusion of alternative PN etiologies and isolated CNS involvement. Clinical, electrophysiologic, imaging, and histopathologic data were collected. PN were classified as neurolymphomatosis or dysimmune neuropathy based on multidisciplinary consensus. Functional outcomes were assessed using the modified Rankin Scale (mRS) and Overall Neuropathy Limitations Scale. The results were compared with a reference cohort of B-Ly-associated PN. Nineteen patients were included (mean age 67.0 ± 11.4 years, 52.6% female) with a median follow-up of 22 months (interquartile range 11.5-30.5). Neurolymphomatosis accounted for 11 cases (58%) and typically presented with multifocal, predominantly axonal neuropathy, including meningoradiculitis and multiple mononeuropathies. Eight patients (42%) had dysimmune neuropathy, most often demyelinating and strongly associated with angio-immunoblastic T-cell lymphoma. Neurologic improvement occurred in 72% of treated patients; however, most patients with neurolymphomatosis showed only partial recovery and persistent disability. IV immunoglobulins were uniformly ineffective, whereas corticosteroids yielded the greatest PN-specific benefit. Compared with B-Ly-associated PN (n = 33), T-Ly-associated PN were associated with more severe disability (median mRS 3 vs 2,  T-Ly-associated PN are predominantly driven by neurolymphomatosis and exhibit more severe clinical profiles and poorer neurologic outcomes than B-Ly-associated PN. Dysimmune neuropathies represent a substantial subset, particularly in angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma. Limitations include the retrospective design and heterogeneity of diagnostic investigations. These findings underscore the need for early recognition and mechanism-specific therapeutic strategies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：T細胞リンパ増殖性疾患（T-Ly）に伴う末梢神経障害（PN）は極めて稀であり、その臨床的特徴や病態は十分に解明されていない。B細胞リンパ増殖性疾患（B-Ly）関連PNとの違いも不明である。  
方法：フランスとスイスの17施設で、T-Ly関連PNの成人患者19例を対象に後ろ向き多施設コホート研究を実施。臨床所見、電気生理学的検査、画像診断、組織病理学的データを収集し、神経リンパ腫症と免疫異常性神経障害に分類。治療反応と機能的転帰を評価し、B-Ly関連PN（33例）と比較した。  
結果：神経リンパ腫症が58％を占め、多発性軸索障害や髄膜根炎を呈した。免疫異常性神経障害は42％で、主に脱髄性で血管免疫芽球性T細胞リンパ腫に多かった。治療により72％で神経症状の改善が見られたが、神経リンパ腫症例は部分的回復にとどまり障害が残存。免疫グロブリン療法は効果が乏しく、ステロイドが最も有効であった。T-Ly関連PNはB-Ly関連PNより重度の障害を示した。  
結論：T-Ly関連PNは主に神経リンパ腫症が原因で、臨床的に重篤かつ予後不良である。免疫異常性神経障害も重要なサブタイプであり、早期診断と病態に即した治療戦略の確立が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: T細胞リンパ増殖性疾患（T-Ly）に伴う末梢神経障害（PN）は稀で、主に神経リンパ腫症（58％）と免疫異常性ニューロパチー（42％）に分類される。神経リンパ腫症は多発性軸索障害を呈し、治療後も部分的回復にとどまり障害が残存しやすい。免疫グロブリン療法は無効で、ステロイドが有効であった。B細胞リンパ増殖性疾患（B-Ly）関連PNより重度の障害を示し、早期診断と機序に応じた治療が重要である。

items.title: Bridging the Gap: Baló Concentric Sclerosis-Like Leukoencephalopathy in Chronic Cocaine Use: A 1-Year Clinical and Imaging Follow-Up of 2 Cases.
items.abstract: Cocaine use is occasionally associated with development of acute leukoencephalopathy but only rarely do the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) features resemble Baló concentric sclerosis, a demyelinating disorder traditionally considered within the multiple sclerosis spectrum. Here, we report 2 patients with history of cocaine use living in the same geographic area who were referred for acute multifocal leukoencephalopathy with a Baló-like pattern.Patient 1, a 31-year-old woman originally from the Philippines with chronic cocaine use history, presented with 1 week of rapidly worsening nonfluent aphasia, neglect, severe right hemiparesis, and numbness on the same side. Two months later, patient 2, a 25-year-old man originally from Morocco with chronic cocaine use history, presented with acute left leg weakness, confusion, and neglect. In both patients, brain MRI revealed multiple T2-hyperintense rounded lesions in the white matter, characterized by a concentric target-like appearance and gadolinium-enhanced incomplete ring pattern. In patient 1, a stereotactic biopsy confirmed a demyelinating inflammatory process with microcystic degeneration, increased cellularity, and macrophage/CD4+ lymphocyte infiltration. Both patients were treated with high-dose IV corticosteroid, resulting in significant clinical and radiologic improvement sustained at 1-year follow-up. Although corticosteroids yield promising outcomes, long-term prognosis hinges on sustained treatment adherence and abstinence from cocaine.The temporal and geographic proximity of these cases, occurring within 2 months in the same Italian province (covering an area of approximately 70 miles), raises the possibility of a shared toxic exposure which might explain the unique pathology and provide clues to the immune mechanisms that drive Baló-like demyelination.
items.summary_ja:
背景：コカイン使用は急性白質脳症を引き起こすことがあるが、MRIでBaló同心性硬化症様の特徴を示す例は稀である。Baló硬化症は多発性硬化症スペクトラムに含まれる脱髄疾患である。  
方法：同一地域に住む慢性コカイン使用歴のある2例を対象に、臨床経過とMRI所見を1年間追跡した。患者1は31歳女性で、非流暢性失語、無視、右片麻痺を呈し、患者2は25歳男性で左下肢の筋力低下と意識障害を呈した。MRIでは両者とも白質に同心円状のT2高信号病変とガドリニウム増強の不完全輪状パターンを認めた。患者1は立体的生検で脱髄性炎症と免疫細胞浸潤を確認した。  
結果：両患者は高用量静脈内ステロイド療法を受け、臨床的・画像的に著明な改善を示し、1年後も良好な経過を維持した。  
結論：コカイン関連のBaló様白質脳症はステロイド治療により改善が期待できるが、長期予後は治療継続とコカイン断絶に依存する。地理的・時間的近接性から共通の毒性曝露が示唆され、Baló様脱髄の免疫機序解明の手がかりとなる可能性がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 慢性コカイン使用者2名が、Baló型の同心円状脱髄を示す急性多巣性白質脳症を発症した。MRIでは特徴的な同心円状病変が認められ、1例は生検で脱髄性炎症が確認された。高用量ステロイド治療により1年後も臨床・画像所見が改善したが、長期予後は治療継続とコカイン断絶に依存する。地理的・時間的近接から共通の毒性曝露が示唆され、Baló様脱髄の免疫機序解明に寄与する可能性がある。

items.title: Intrathecal Mesenchymal Stem Cells in Progressive Multiple Sclerosis: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Trial (SMART-MS).
items.abstract: There is an unmet need for neuroregenerative therapies in multiple sclerosis (MS). Mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs) have shown immunomodulatory and regenerative effects in preclinical models and early clinical studies. Intrathecal administration may enhance therapeutic potential by direct delivery to the CNS. However, randomized, placebo-controlled trials are needed to establish safety and efficacy. The objective of this trial was to assess whether a single intrathecal administration of autologous MSCs could provide evidence of a neuroregenerative effect in progressive MS. In this randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled phase I/II trial (NCT04749667), patients with progressive MS enrolled at 4 Norwegian tertiary hospitals received a single intrathecal injection of autologous bone marrow-derived MSCs (1 × 10 A total of 18 patients were included (mean age 46.7 years; 55.6% female). No significant between-group difference was observed for the primary end point (β = -0.31, 95% CI -1.84 to 1.22,  A neuroregenerative effect was not detected, although interpretation may be limited by the small sample size. Adverse events suggest an acute localized inflammatory reaction after MSC administration. Our findings suggest that intrathecal administration of MSCs in progressive MS should be approached with caution in future studies. This study provides Class III evidence that, in patients with progressive multiple sclerosis, treatment with a single intrathecal administration of autologous mesenchymal stem cells does not provide neuroregenerative effect, as assessed by a composite evoked potential score. ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT04749667); registered February 8, 2021; first patient enrolled August 9, 2021.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）における神経再生療法のニーズは高い。間葉系幹細胞（MSC）は免疫調節および再生効果が期待され、脳脊髄液内（髄腔内）投与により中枢神経系への直接的な治療効果が期待されるが、ランダム化プラセボ対照試験による安全性・有効性の検証が必要である。  
方法：進行型MS患者18名（平均年齢46.7歳、女性55.6%）を対象に、4つのノルウェーの三次医療機関で自家骨髄由来MSCを単回髄腔内投与する二重盲検プラセボ対照第I/II相試験を実施した。  
結果：主要評価項目である複合誘発電位スコアにおいて、MSC投与群とプラセボ群間で有意差は認められなかった（β = -0.31, 95% CI -1.84～1.22）。副作用としてMSC投与後に局所的な急性炎症反応が示唆された。  
結論：単回の髄腔内MSC投与は進行型MS患者において神経再生効果を示さず、今後の研究では慎重な検討が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 進行性多発性硬化症（MS）患者18名を対象に、自家骨髄由来間葉系幹細胞（MSC）の単回脊髄内投与の神経再生効果を検証した無作為二重盲検プラセボ対照試験を実施した。主要評価項目に有意差は認められず、MSC投与後に局所的な急性炎症反応が示唆された。結果はサンプル数の制約もあり慎重な解釈が必要で、進行性MSに対するMSCの脊髄内投与は今後の研究で注意が求められる。

items.title: Explainable Artificial Intelligence to Predict Neurocognitive Disorder Progression in Multiple Sclerosis Using MRI and Clinical Data.
items.abstract: Cognitive impairment is common in multiple sclerosis (MS), yet the application of diagnostic frameworks of Neurocognitive Disorders (NCDs) is limited. Additionally, the integration of multimodal data for predicting cognitive outcomes using artificial intelligence (AI) remains underexplored. This study aimed to characterize NCDs in MS and predict cognitive worsening using an explainable deep learning model trained on MRI and clinical data. Two-hundred twenty-four MS patients and 115 healthy controls (HC) underwent 3.0 T MRI and clinical assessment at baseline. MS patients also completed neuropsychological testing, including estimation of z-cognitive reserve, at baseline and after a median follow-up of 3.4 (interquartile range = [2.0; 6.1]) years. MS patients were classified as Mild or Major NCD according to the Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders criteria at baseline, and as "stable" or "worsened" based on cognitive changes at follow-up. A deep learning model was trained on baseline T1-weighted MRI, demographic, clinical, and brain volumetric data to predict cognitive decline, with explainability methods used to interpret the model's decisions. At baseline, 4% of patients had Mild and 11% Major NCD. At follow-up, 12% showed cognitive decline. The deep learning model predicted follow-up cognitive status with 90% accuracy. Explainability models identified the most relevant predictors, in order of importance: cortical gray matter volume, age, thalamic and hippocampal volumes, T2 lesion volume, and z-cognitive reserve. The proposed multimodal AI approach demonstrated robust performance and highlighted relevant brain regions associated with cognitive worsening, underscoring its potential for personalized cognitive assessment and monitoring in MS.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）では認知機能障害が一般的であるが、神経認知障害（NCD）の診断枠組みの適用は限定的であり、MRIや臨床データを用いた多モーダルAIによる認知予測も十分に研究されていない。  
方法：224名のMS患者と115名の健常者が3.0T MRIと臨床評価を受け、MS患者は神経心理検査を基にDSM基準で軽度または重度のNCDに分類された。中央値3.4年の追跡期間後、認知機能の変化により「安定」または「悪化」に分類。T1強調MRI、人口統計、臨床、脳容積データを用い、深層学習モデルで認知機能悪化を予測し、説明可能性手法でモデルの判断根拠を解析した。  
結果：ベースラインで4％が軽度NCD、11％が重度NCD。追跡時に12％が認知機能低下を示した。モデルは90％の精度で認知状態を予測。重要な予測因子は皮質灰白質容積、年齢、視床・海馬容積、T2病変容積、認知予備力の順であった。  
結論：多モーダルAIはMSにおける認知機能悪化の高精度予測を可能にし、関連脳領域の特定も示した。個別化認知評価・モニタリングへの応用が期待される。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症（MS）患者の神経認知障害（NCD）進行を、MRIと臨床データを用いた説明可能な深層学習モデルで予測した。224名のMS患者を対象に、ベースラインと約3.4年後の認知機能を評価し、モデルは90％の精度で認知悪化を予測。重要な予測因子は皮質灰白質体積、年齢、視床・海馬体積、T2病変体積、認知予備力であり、個別化された認知評価・モニタリングへの応用が期待される。

items.title: Industry Payments and Prescribing of Brand-Name Multiple Sclerosis Medications in Medicare.
items.abstract: Industry payments to clinicians influence prescribing, limiting use of lower-cost generics, and leading to nonadherence. This study of prescribing for multiple sclerosis examined whether payments from brand-name drug manufacturers were associated with prescribing of brand-name glatiramer and dimethyl fumarate after generics became available. This cross-sectional study used 2021-2022 Open Payments data and 2022-2023 Medicare Part D prescription data. Payments from Teva (glatiramer) and Biogen (dimethyl fumarate) were categorized as none, <$1,000, or ≥$1,000. The outcome was the proportion of brand-name prescriptions per clinician, categorized as low (<20%), medium (20%-79%), or high (≥80%). Associations were assessed using multinomial logistic regression, adjusting for prescriber type, prescription volume, and geographic region. Among 2,675 glatiramer and 2,138 dimethyl fumarate prescribers, 1,026 (38.4%) and 1,238 (57.9%) received payments, respectively. Receiving ≥$1,000 in payments was associated with a greater odds of high brand-name prescribing for glatiramer (adjusted odds ratio [aOR] 4.21, 95% CI 1.81-9.81,  Payments to clinicians were associated with lower uptake of generic versions of 2 MS drugs, resulting in higher spending by patients and the US health care system.
items.summary_ja:
背景：製薬業界からの医師への支払いは処方行動に影響を与え、低コストのジェネリック薬の使用を妨げ、患者の服薬遵守を低下させる可能性がある。本研究は、多発性硬化症（MS）治療薬のブランド名薬に対する支払いが、ジェネリック薬が利用可能になった後のブランド名薬の処方に関連するかを検証した。

方法：2021-2023年のOpen PaymentsデータとMedicare Part D処方データを用いた横断研究。グラチラマー（Teva製）とジメチルフマル酸（Biogen製）に対する支払いを「なし」「1,000ドル未満」「1,000ドル以上」に分類し、医師ごとのブランド名薬処方割合を「低（<20%）」「中（20%-79%）」「高（≥80%）」に分け、多項ロジスティック回帰で処方医種別や処方量、地域を調整して関連を分析。

結果：グラチラマー処方医2,675人中38.4%、ジメチルフマル酸処方医2,138人中57.9%が支払いを受けた。1,000ドル以上の支払いを受けた医師は、グラチラマーの高頻度ブランド名処方のオッズが4.21倍（95%CI 1.81-9.81）と有意に高かった。

結論：製薬業界からの支払いはMS治療薬のジェネリック薬の普及を妨げ、患者および米国医療システムの医療費増加に寄与している可能性が示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症治療薬の処方において、製薬企業からの支払いがブランド薬の処方増加と関連することを調査した。2021-2023年のデータ分析で、テバ社とバイオジェン社から1,000ドル以上の支払いを受けた医師は、ジェネリック薬よりもブランド薬を高頻度に処方する傾向が強く、患者および医療制度の費用増加に寄与していることが示された。

items.title: Resting-State EEG Microstates as Dynamic Biomarkers of Network Dysfunction and Cognitive Impairment in Patients With Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: Multiple sclerosis (MS) is characterized by large-scale brain network dysfunctions. EEG microstate analysis may track these dynamics. We investigated whether microstates could distinguish patients with MS from healthy volunteers, and cognitively impaired from cognitively preserved (CP) patients. For this cross-sectional observational study, we recruited participants from the Policlinico Umberto I Multiple Sclerosis Center (Rome). We compared microstates of patients with relapsing-remitting MS (Expanded Disability Status Scale [EDSS] score <3, no relapses within 30 days) with those of age-matched and sex-matched healthy volunteers. We also compared cognitively impaired and preserved patients. Group comparisons were performed on microstate temporal parameters and topographies (topographic analysis of variance). Classification used stepwise linear discriminant analysis (LDA). We enrolled 88 patients with MS (60 women, mean age 42.75 years) and 46 healthy volunteers (23 women, mean age 33.7 years). Compared with healthy volunteers (n = 45, 23 women, mean age 33.7 years), patients with MS (n = 46, 25 women, mean age 34.6 years) showed greater explained variance ( EEG microstates reveal behaviorally relevant alterations in patients with MS, supporting their utility as sensitive markers of large-scale functional network reorganization associated with clinical disability.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）は大規模な脳ネットワーク機能障害を特徴とし、脳波（EEG）マイクロステート解析がその動的変化を捉える可能性がある。  
方法：ローマのPoliclinico Umberto I MSセンターで再発寛解型MS患者（EDSSスコア3未満、30日以内の再発なし）と年齢・性別を一致させた健常者を対象に、EEGマイクロステートの時間的パラメータとトポグラフィーを比較した。また、認知障害の有無による患者間比較も行い、段階的線形判別分析（LDA）で分類を試みた。  
結果：MS患者（n=88、平均年齢42.75歳）は健常者（n=46、平均年齢33.7歳）に比べ、マイクロステートの説明分散が大きく、認知障害のある患者と認知保持患者間でも有意差が認められた。  
結論：EEGマイクロステートはMS患者の行動関連変化を反映し、臨床的障害に伴う大規模機能ネットワークの再編成を敏感に示す動的バイオマーカーとして有用である。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症（MS）患者の安静時EEGマイクロステートを解析し、健常者との脳ネットワーク機能の違いや認知障害の有無を検討した。MS患者は健常者に比べマイクロステートの時間的特徴や分布に有意差があり、認知障害の識別にも有用であった。これにより、EEGマイクロステートはMSに伴う大規模ネットワーク機能障害や認知機能低下の動的バイオマーカーとして有望であることが示された。

items.title: Diagnostic Value of the Kappa Free Light Chain Index to Distinguish MOGAD, NMOSD, and MS.
items.abstract: The differential diagnosis between aquaporin-4-immunoglobulin G-positive neuromyelitis optica spectrum disorder (AQP4-NMOSD), myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein (MOG) antibody-associated disease (MOGAD), and multiple sclerosis (MS) can be complex. Kappa free light chain index (KFLC-Index) emerged as an effective biomarker for distinguishing patients with MS from patients with other conditions. The main aim of this study was to assess the diagnostic performance of KFLC-Index in differentiating MOGAD, AQP4-NMOSD, and MS and to compare it with CSF-restricted oligoclonal bands (OCB) performance. We conducted a retrospective case-control study involving 18 French centers through our national NOMADMUS database. Patients were eligible if they received MOGAD or AQP4-NMOSD diagnosis and if OCB status and KFLC-Index levels were available or could be measured retrospectively. As a comparator, we included a group of patients with MS from the Lyon center. We included 303 patients with 140 MOGAD, 37 AQP4-NMOSD, and 126 MS. The sex ratio F/M was 1/1 in the MOGAD group, 5/1 in the NMOSD group, and 4/1 in the MS group. The median age was 38 years in the MOGAD group, 52 in the NMOSD group, and 32 in the MS group. The median KFLC-Index (interquartile range) was the lowest in the MOGAD group (0.60 [0.33-2.09]) with 71% of undetectable CSF-KFLC, intermediate in the NMOSD group (8.85 [3.04-16.78]), and the highest in the MS group (49.90 [16.31-113.39]). KFLC-Index had very good diagnostic performance in differentiating MOGAD from MS (area under the curve [AUC] 0.93, 95% CI 0.9-0.96) with an optimal threshold of 5.7 (95% CI 4.74-6.85), a sensitivity of 0.89 (0.83-0.94), and a specificity of 0.89 (0.83-0.94). KFLC-Index had good performance in differentiating NMOSD from MS (AUC 0.82, 95% CI 0.74-0.88) and MOGAD from NMOSD (AUC 0.77, 95% CI 0.69-0.86). KFLC-Index did not significantly outperformed OCB in separating MOGAD from MS and NMOSD from MS; however, the combination of the 2 tests was more performant than used separately. KFLC-Index is a valuable tool in distinguishing MS from AQP4-NMOSD and MOGAD and provides additional information to that given by OCB. We suggest that KFLC-Index as an additional supporting criterion for the differential diagnosis between MOGAD and MS.
items.summary_ja: 背景：アクアポリン-4抗体陽性視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害（AQP4-NMOSD）、ミエリンオリゴデンドロサイト糖タンパク抗体関連疾患（MOGAD）、多発性硬化症（MS）の鑑別は困難である。方法：フランスの18施設からなるNOMADMUSデータベースを用いた後ろ向き症例対照研究で、MOGAD、AQP4-NMOSD、MS患者計303名（MOGAD 140、AQP4-NMOSD 37、MS 126）を対象に、脳脊髄液中のカッパ自由軽鎖指数（KFLC-Index）と制限性オリゴクローナルバンド（OCB）の診断性能を比較した。結果：KFLC-Indexの中央値はMOGAD群で最も低く（0.60）、NMOSD群で中間（8.85）、MS群で最も高かった（49.90）。MOGADとMSの鑑別においてKFLC-IndexはAUC 0.93、感度89％、特異度89％と高い診断性能を示した。NMOSDとMS、MOGADとNMOSDの鑑別でも良好な性能を示したが、OCB単独と比較して有意な優位性はなかった。ただし、KFLC-IndexとOCBの併用は単独より優れていた。結論：KFLC-IndexはMSとAQP4-NMOSDおよびMOGADの鑑別に有用であり、OCBと併用することで診断精度が向上するため、MOGADとMSの鑑別の補助的指標として推奨される。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、MOG抗体関連疾患（MOGAD）、AQP4抗体陽性視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害（AQP4-NMOSD）、多発性硬化症（MS）の鑑別におけるカッパ自由軽鎖指数（KFLC-Index）の診断価値を検討した。303例を対象に解析し、KFLC-IndexはMSとMOGADの鑑別に高い精度（AUC 0.93）を示し、NMOSDとの鑑別にも有用であった。OCB検査との併用で診断能が向上し、KFLC-Indexは鑑別診断の補助的指標として有望である。

items.title: Global & Community Health: Diagnosis and Management of Multiple Sclerosis in Nepal: Overcoming Barriers Through Local Adaptations.
items.abstract: Multiple sclerosis (MS) is the most common demyelinating disease of the CNS and disproportionately affects younger individuals, yet it remains underdiagnosed and undertreated in many low and middle-income countries. We describe key barriers to timely diagnosis and effective management of MS in Nepal, including limited public and clinician awareness; restricted access to neurologic care, MRI, and essential laboratory testing; and the high cost of long-term treatment. We also outline practical, context-specific adaptations such as simplified diagnostic pathways, use of affordable immunosuppressive therapies, and sustained advocacy by the Multiple Sclerosis Society of Nepal to improve access and affordability. Our experience illustrates pragmatic, low-cost strategies that may support more equitable MS care in resource-constrained settings.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）は中枢神経系の脱髄疾患で若年層に多いが、低・中所得国では診断や治療が遅れがちである。  
方法：ネパールにおけるMSの診断・管理の障壁を調査し、現地の状況に応じた適応策を検討した。具体的には、医療従事者や一般の認知度の低さ、神経内科受診やMRI検査、必要な検査へのアクセス制限、長期治療の高コストを挙げている。  
結果：簡略化した診断手順や、手頃な免疫抑制剤の活用、ネパール多発性硬化症協会による継続的な啓発活動が、診断・治療の遅れを改善し、医療アクセスと費用負担の軽減に寄与した。  
結論：資源制約のある環境でも、現地に適した低コストの実践的戦略を導入することで、MS患者への公平な医療提供が可能であることを示した。
items.summary_short_ja: 多発性硬化症（MS）は若年層に多い中枢神経脱髄疾患であるが、ネパールでは診断・治療が遅れがちである。主な障壁は、医療者・一般の認知不足、神経科受診やMRI検査の制限、高額な治療費である。著者らは、簡素化した診断手順や低価格の免疫抑制薬の活用、MS協会による継続的な啓発活動など、現地に適した実践的対策を提案し、資源制約下での公平なMS医療の推進を示した。

items.title: Performance of the 2024 McDonald Criteria in Patients Under Evaluation for Suspected Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: The 2024 McDonald criteria provide new recommendations for multiple sclerosis (MS) diagnosis, but validation of the criteria is lacking. We wanted to investigate the application and performance of the 2024 McDonald criteria in patients with suspected MS seen in routine clinical practice. We retrospectively identified patients referred with clinical and/or radiologic suspicion for MS between January and December 2024. All patients had a minimum diagnostic evaluation with brain and spinal cord MRI. The 2017 McDonald criteria were applied prospectively, and the 2024 McDonald criteria were applied retrospectively after the initial diagnostic workup and at last follow-up. We investigated (1) the number of patients diagnosed with MS using the 2017 McDonald criteria or the 2024 McDonald criteria, and (2) the diagnostic performance of the 2024 McDonald criteria when applied during the initial diagnostic workup, with an MS diagnosis using the 2017 McDonald criteria as the reference-standard. In 347 patients (mean age 39.4 years, 66% female) with suspected MS followed up for mean 15.3 (range 8-20) months, 73 (21%) had alternative disorders and were excluded. After applying the 2024 McDonald criteria in the remaining 274 patients, more patients were diagnosed with MS after the initial diagnostic workup (220 vs 172,  Use of the 2024 McDonald allows for earlier MS diagnosis, but also more frequent diagnosis including in patients with radiologically isolated syndrome. The revised criteria have similar performance across the lifespan. Limitations include the lack of data on central vein sign and kappa free light chains, and missing optic nerve assessment in some patients.
items.summary_ja:
背景：2024年版McDonald基準は多発性硬化症（MS）診断の新たな推奨を示すが、その妥当性は未検証である。  
方法：2024年1～12月にMS疑いで紹介された347例を対象に、脳・脊髄MRIを用いた診断評価を実施。2017年基準は前向きに、2024年基準は後ろ向きに適用し、診断数と初期診断時の性能を比較した。  
結果：平均追跡期間15.3か月で、21％に他疾患を認め除外。残る274例で2024年基準適用後は初期診断でMS患者数が172例から220例に増加。2024年基準は放射線学的孤立症候群も含め早期診断を可能にし、年齢層を問わず同等の診断性能を示した。  
結論：2024年McDonald基準はMSの早期診断を促進し、より多くの患者を診断可能とするが、中心静脈徴候やκフリーライトチェーンのデータ欠如、視神経評価の未実施などの制約がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 2024年版マクドナルド基準は、多発性硬化症（MS）の早期診断を可能にし、2017年版よりも多くの患者をMSと診断した。347例中274例を対象に検証し、初期診断時の適用で220例がMSと診断された。新基準は生涯を通じて安定した診断性能を示すが、中心静脈徴候やカッパフリーライトチェーンのデータ欠如、視神経評価の不足が課題である。

items.title: Frequency of AQP4 and MOG Antibodies in Patients With Optic Neuritis Fulfilling Minimal New Multiple Sclerosis MRI Criteria.
items.abstract: Recent revisions to multiple sclerosis (MS) diagnostic criteria include the optic nerve as a site of dissemination in space, enabling this diagnosis in patients with acute optic neuritis (ON) and a single additional MS-typical location on MRI if dissemination in time (DIT) is demonstrated. We aimed to assess the frequency of non-MS diagnoses in this context. We retrospectively analyzed consecutive patients with inaugural acute ON and at least 1 MS-typical lesion in a single brain location on baseline MRI across 3 French centers. All patients met DIT criteria and underwent aquaporin-4 (AQP4) and myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein (MOG) antibody testing. Final diagnoses were based on clinical, radiologic, and follow-up data. Among 96 patients (mean age 35.8 years; 70.8% female), 73 (76.0%) were diagnosed with MS and 23 (24.0%) with MOG antibody-associated disease (n = 18) or neuromyelitis optica spectrum disorder. Longitudinally extensive lesions, bilateral involvement, chiasmal enhancement, or optic perineuritis were observed in 100% of non-MS patients and 24.6% of patients with MS (difference 75.4%, 95% CI: 64.3-86.6;  AQP4 and MOG antibody testing, along with careful orbital MRI interpretation, is recommended in patients with ON meeting minimal new MS criteria.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）の診断基準改訂により、視神経が病変の空間的拡散部位に含まれ、急性視神経炎（ON）患者でMRIにMS典型病変が1か所あれば時間的拡散（DIT）を示すことでMS診断が可能となった。しかし、この基準下での非MS疾患の頻度は不明であった。  
方法：フランスの3施設で、初発急性ON患者96名（平均年齢35.8歳、女性70.8％）を対象に、ベースラインMRIでMS典型病変が1か所以上ある患者を後ろ向きに解析。全員がDIT基準を満たし、AQP4抗体およびMOG抗体検査を実施。最終診断は臨床、画像、経過観察に基づく。  
結果：96例中73例（76.0％）がMS、23例（24.0％）がMOG抗体関連疾患（18例）または視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害と診断された。非MS群は長大病変、両側性病変、視交叉の造影効果、視神経周囲炎を100％認めたのに対し、MS群は24.6％であった（差75.4％、95％CI:64.3-86.6）。  
結論：新しいMS診断基準を満たすON患者では、AQP4およびMOG抗体検査と詳細な眼窩MRI評価が推奨される。
items.summary_short_ja: 急性視神経炎（ON）で新しい多発性硬化症（MS）MRI基準を満たす患者96例を解析した結果、76％がMS、24％がMOG抗体関連疾患または視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害と診断された。非MS患者は長大病変や両側性病変、視交叉の造影効果などを示し、AQP4およびMOG抗体検査と詳細な眼窩MRI評価が重要とされた。

items.title: Occupational Exposure to Industrial Dust and Rates of Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: Exposure to lung irritants such as smoking and organic solvents has been associated with increased risk of multiple sclerosis (MS), particularly among genetically susceptible individuals. The aim of this study was to investigate the association between occupational exposure to industrial dust and MS and to assess potential interactions with smoking and  We conducted a Swedish population-based case-control study. Patients with incident MS age 16-70 years were consecutively identified by neurologists at 40 clinics (2005-2015). Eligibility criteria for participants were age 16-70 years, residence in Sweden, and a neurologist-confirmed diagnosis of MS according to the McDonald criteria. Controls without MS were randomly sampled from the national population register using density sampling and frequency-matched to cases on age, sex, and residential area. Occupational dust exposure was assessed using questionnaire data. Logistic regression was used to estimate odds ratios (ORs) and 95% CIs. Additive interactions between dust exposure and smoking and between dust exposure and  The analytic sample included 2,070 participants and 2,899 controls. The mean age at index was 34.4 years for participants and 35.4 years for controls. Women comprised 72.5% of participants and 75.1% of controls. Industrial dust exposure was associated with increased rate of MS (OR 1.30, 95% CI 1.05-1.63), with a dose-response relationship with duration (OR per 1-year exposure 1.03, 95% CI 1.00-1.06). Evidence of additive interactions was observed between dust exposure and smoking (AP 0.32, 95% CI 0.03-0.62) and between dust exposure and  Occupational dust exposure was associated with increased rate of MS, particularly in combination with smoking and HLA-DRB1*15:01, suggesting joint effects of occupational, environmental, and genetic risk factors. The reliance on self-reported occupational histories and potential residual confounding are important limitations. Further studies are warranted to clarify underlying mechanisms and to inform preventive strategies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：喫煙や有機溶剤などの肺刺激物への曝露は、多発性硬化症（MS）のリスク増加と関連し、特に遺伝的感受性を持つ個人で顕著である。本研究は、職業的な工業粉塵曝露とMSの関連性、および喫煙や遺伝子型（HLA-DRB1*15:01）との相互作用を検討することを目的とした。

方法：スウェーデンの16～70歳の新規MS患者2,070名と対照2,899名を対象に、40の神経科クリニックで2005～2015年に症例対照研究を実施。職業歴は質問票で評価し、ロジスティック回帰でオッズ比（OR）を算出。曝露と喫煙・遺伝子型の加法的相互作用も解析した。

結果：工業粉塵曝露はMS発症率の増加と関連（OR 1.30、95%CI 1.05-1.63）し、曝露期間の延長に伴う用量反応関係も認められた。粉塵曝露と喫煙（AP 0.32、95%CI 0.03-0.62）、および粉塵曝露とHLA-DRB1*15:01の間に加法的相互作用が示された。

結論：職業的工業粉塵曝露はMSリスクを高め、特に喫煙や遺伝的素因と組み合わさることでリスクが増大する可能性が示唆された。自己申告による曝露評価や残存交絡の可能性が限界であり、今後の研究でメカニズム解明と予防策の検討が求められる。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究はスウェーデンの症例対照研究により、職業的な工業粉塵曝露が多発性硬化症（MS）の発症率増加と関連し、曝露期間の長さに比例することを示した。特に喫煙および遺伝的リスク因子HLA-DRB1*15:01との相互作用が認められ、職業的・環境的・遺伝的要因の複合的影響が示唆された。ただし自己申告による曝露評価や交絡因子の影響に限界があり、さらなる研究が必要である。

items.title: Prevalence and Relative Proportions of Multiple Sclerosis, Neuromyelitis Optica Spectrum Disorder, and Myelin Oligodendrocyte Glycoprotein Antibody-Associated Disease in the Republic of Korea.
items.abstract: To provide the clinically validated, nationwide estimates of multiple sclerosis (MS), neuromyelitis optica spectrum disorder (NMOSD), and myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein antibody-associated disease (MOGAD) in Korea, and to describe their relative proportions. From January to March 2025, 47 referral hospitals participating in a nationwide hospital-based registry identified actively followed patients with MS, NMOSD, or MOGAD. Diagnoses followed international criteria, and antibody status was confirmed using validated CBAs. Actively followed patients had ≥1 outpatient visit in the prior 6 months. Centers provided demographics, treatments, and Expanded Disability Status Scale. Prevalence used national population data. A total of 4,196 patients were identified, 1,799 MS, 1,616 NMOSD, and 781 MOGAD (ratio 2.3:2.1:1). Mean age at onset was 33.4 ± 12.0 years for MS, 42.7 ± 14.7 for NMOSD, and 41.7 ± 17.8 for MOGAD, and the female-to-male ratios were 2.2:1 for MS, 5.1:1 for NMOSD (6.5:1 in aquaporin-4-IgG positive cases), and 1.5:1 for MOGAD. Crude prevalence estimates were 3.48, 3.13, and 1.51 per 100,000, respectively. This nationwide registry demonstrates a distinctive Korean CNS inflammatory demyelinating disease profile, with a relatively higher proportion of NMOSD and MOGAD reflecting the low prevalence of MS in East Asia.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）、視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害（NMOSD）、およびミエリンオリゴデンドロサイト糖タンパク抗体関連疾患（MOGAD）は中枢神経系の炎症性脱髄疾患であり、その国内有病率と相対的割合は地域差が大きい。  
方法：2025年1～3月に韓国全国の47の紹介病院が参加する病院ベースの登録システムを用い、国際基準に基づく診断と抗体検査（CBAs）で確定したMS、NMOSD、MOGAD患者を抽出。直近6か月以内に外来受診歴のある患者を対象とし、人口統計、治療内容、障害度（EDSS）を収集。国勢データを用いて有病率を算出した。  
結果：計4,196例（MS 1,799例、NMOSD 1,616例、MOGAD 781例）が登録され、患者比は約2.3：2.1：1。発症年齢中央値はMSが33.4歳、NMOSDが42.7歳、MOGADが41.7歳。女性比はMSで2.2倍、NMOSDで5.1倍（抗アクアポリン4-IgG陽性例は6.5倍）、MOGADで1.5倍。粗有病率はMSが3.48、NMOSDが3.13、MOGADが1.51/10万人。  
結論：韓国における中枢神経炎症性脱髄疾患の特徴的な分布が示され、東アジアでMSの有病率が低い一方でNMOSDおよびMOGADの割合が相対的に高いことが明らかとなった。
items.summary_short_ja: 韓国における多発性硬化症（MS）、視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害（NMOSD）、ミエリンオリゴデンドロサイト糖タンパク抗体関連疾患（MOGAD）の全国的な有病率と比率を調査した。2025年初頭に47病院で4,196例を確認し、MSが1,799例、NMOSDが1,616例、MOGADが781例で比率は2.3:2.1:1。MSの発症平均年齢は33.4歳、NMOSDは42.7歳、MOGADは41.7歳。女性比率はNMOSDが特に高く、各疾患の有病率はそれぞれ3.48、3.13、1.51/10万人であった。東アジア特有の疾患分布を示す。

items.title: Clinical Insights Into CASPR1 and CASPR1/Contactin-1 Complex Autoimmune Nodopathies.
items.abstract: Clinical phenotypes of neuropathies associated with contactin-associated protein-1 (CASPR1) or isolated CASPR1/contactin-1 (CNTN1)-complex-IgG are not well characterized, and we aimed to describe the same. Patient sera positive for CASPR1 or CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG by cell-based assay (CBA) at Mayo Clinic Neuroimmunology Laboratory (January 1, 2010-May 31, 2024) was identified retrospectively and prospectively. Clinical and paraclinical data were collected. CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG-positive sera were tested using tissue indirect immunofluorescence assay, murine teased nerve fibers, and ELISAs for CASPR1 and CNTN1 to elucidate antigenic targets. Patients were compared with CNTN1-IgG and NF155-IgG4 autoimmune nodopathy cohorts. Among 17 CASPR1 or isolated CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG-seropositive patients identified, 14 had clinical data (CASPR1-IgG = 8 [50% males, median age 50 years], CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG = 6 [67% males, median age 42 years]). Neuropathic pain was more common in CASPR1-IgG (88% vs 33%), while sensory ataxia was more frequent in CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG cases (100% vs 75%). All showed primarily demyelinating electrophysiology (1 CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG case presented as chronic inflammatory sensory polyradiculopathy). Intravenous immunoglobulin (IVIg) refractoriness occurred in 63% of CASPR1-IgG and 40% of CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG. Rituximab was effective in 6 of 7 (86%) treated patients. One patient with CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG who was refractory to multiple immunotherapies underwent allogenic hematopoietic stem cell transplant after which she was off immunotherapies and is in sustained remission for the past 10 years. CASPR1-IgG patients progressed faster to nadir than NF155-IgG4 ( CASPR1-IgG and CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG neuropathies, though rare, usually have a rapidly progressive course. Both are frequently IVIg-refractory and respond to rituximab. Compared with NF155-IgG4 nodopathies, CASPR1-IgG exhibits faster progression, while some CASPR1/CNTN1-complex-IgG nodopathies can cause greater long-term disability.
items.summary_ja:
背景：CASPR1およびCASPR1/CNTN1複合体に対する自己抗体を持つ神経障害の臨床像は十分に解明されていない。  
方法：2010年から2024年までにMayo ClinicでCASPR1またはCASPR1/CNTN1複合体IgG陽性と判定された患者17名（うち14名に臨床データあり）を対象に、臨床・検査データを収集し、抗原特異性を免疫染色やELISAで解析。CNTN1-IgGおよびNF155-IgG4自己免疫性ノードパチー患者群と比較した。  
結果：CASPR1-IgG陽性患者は神経障害性疼痛が多く（88%）、CASPR1/CNTN1複合体IgG陽性患者は感覚性運動失調が多かった（100%）。全例で主に脱髄性の電気生理学的所見を示し、IVIg抵抗性はCASPR1-IgG群で63%、複合体IgG群で40%。リツキシマブ治療は86%の患者で有効であり、1例は多剤抵抗性後に同種造血幹細胞移植で長期寛解を得た。CASPR1-IgG患者はNF155-IgG4患者よりも急速に症状が進行した。  
結論：CASPR1およびCASPR1/CNTN1複合体IgG関連神経障害は稀だが急速進行性で、IVIg抵抗性が多い一方リツキシマブに良好に反応する。CASPR1-IgGはNF155-IgG4より進行が速く、複合体IgGは長期的な障害が大きい場合がある。
items.summary_short_ja: CASPR1およびCASPR1/CNTN1複合体に関連する自己免疫性神経障害は稀であるが、急速に進行することが多い。CASPR1-IgG陽性患者は神経痛が多く、CASPR1/CNTN1複合体陽性患者は感覚性運動失調が顕著である。両者とも主に脱髄性の電気生理学的所見を示し、静脈内免疫グロブリン療法（IVIg）に抵抗性が高いが、リツキシマブ治療には良好に反応する。NF155-IgG4関連疾患と比較すると、CASPR1-IgGはより速い進行を示し、CASPR1/CNTN1複合体は長期的な障害が大きい場合がある。

items.title: Genetic Determinants of Multiple Sclerosis Susceptibility in People From Diverse Ancestral Backgrounds.
items.abstract: The genetic basis of multiple sclerosis (MS) susceptibility has been studied extensively in European (EUR) ancestry populations. The aim of our study was to determine the genetic architecture of MS susceptibility in people of South Asian (SAS) and African (AFR) genetic ancestral backgrounds. We recruited and genotyped a cohort of ancestrally diverse people with MS (pwMS) from across the United Kingdom. Cases were combined with controls from the UK Biobank (UKB). After genetic ancestry inference, we performed within-ancestry case-control genetic association studies of MS susceptibility, exploring single nucleotide variants and imputed classical human leukocyte antigen alleles. We analyzed genetic data from 676 pwMS from our cohort (median age = 45.7 years, 71.7% female genetic sex), 2,426 pwMS from the UKB (median age = 55.0 years, 72.3% female), and 27,640 UKB controls (median age = 54.0 years, 52.5% female). Genetic variants within the Major Histocompatibility Complex were associated with MS susceptibility across all ancestries (SAS: lead SNP chr6:32635095:G:C, odds ratio [OR] = 1.7,  The genetic architecture of MS susceptibility shows strong concordance across ancestral groups suggesting shared disease mechanisms. Larger studies in diverse populations are likely to enhance our understanding of how genetic variation contributes to MS susceptibility in people of all ancestral backgrounds.
items.summary_ja:
背景：多発性硬化症（MS）の遺伝的感受性は主にヨーロッパ系集団で研究されてきたが、南アジア系（SAS）やアフリカ系（AFR）集団における遺伝的構造は不明であった。  
方法：英国全土から多様な遺伝的背景を持つMS患者676名を募集し、UKバイオバンクのMS患者2,426名および27,640名の対照群と合わせて遺伝子解析を実施。遺伝的祖先推定後、各祖先集団内でケース・コントロールの遺伝子関連解析を行い、単一塩基多型（SNP）およびヒト白血球抗原（HLA）アレルの関連を調査した。  
結果：主要組織適合複合体（MHC）領域の遺伝子変異がすべての祖先集団でMS感受性と有意に関連し、SAS集団ではリードSNP（chr6:32635095:G:C）がオッズ比1.7を示した。  
結論：MS感受性の遺伝的構造は祖先集団間で高い一致を示し、共通の疾患メカニズムが示唆される。多様な集団での大規模研究が、MSの遺伝的要因理解をさらに深めると期待される。
items.summary_short_ja: 多民族背景の多発性硬化症（MS）感受性の遺伝的要因を調査した。本研究は英国在住の南アジア系およびアフリカ系のMS患者676名とUKバイオバンクのデータを用い、単一塩基多型やHLA遺伝子の関連を解析した。主要組織適合複合体領域の遺伝子変異が全祖先集団でMS感受性に関連し、遺伝的構造は共通の病態機序を示す。多様な集団での大規模研究がMSの遺伝的理解を深めると結論づけた。

items.title: Performance of the 2024 McDonald Criteria in Patients Under Evaluation for Suspected Multiple Sclerosis.
items.abstract: The 2024 McDonald criteria provide new recommendations for multiple sclerosis (MS) diagnosis, but validation of the criteria is lacking. We wanted to investigate the application and performance of the 2024 McDonald criteria in patients with suspected MS seen in routine clinical practice. We retrospectively identified patients referred with clinical and/or radiologic suspicion for MS between January and December 2024. All patients had a minimum diagnostic evaluation with brain and spinal cord MRI. The 2017 McDonald criteria were applied prospectively, and the 2024 McDonald criteria were applied retrospectively after the initial diagnostic workup and at last follow-up. We investigated (1) the number of patients diagnosed with MS using the 2017 McDonald criteria or the 2024 McDonald criteria, and (2) the diagnostic performance of the 2024 McDonald criteria when applied during the initial diagnostic workup, with an MS diagnosis using the 2017 McDonald criteria as the reference-standard. In 347 patients (mean age 39.4 years, 66% female) with suspected MS followed up for mean 15.3 (range 8-20) months, 73 (21%) had alternative disorders and were excluded. After applying the 2024 McDonald criteria in the remaining 274 patients, more patients were diagnosed with MS after the initial diagnostic workup (220 vs 172,  Use of the 2024 McDonald allows for earlier MS diagnosis, but also more frequent diagnosis including in patients with radiologically isolated syndrome. The revised criteria have similar performance across the lifespan. Limitations include the lack of data on central vein sign and kappa free light chains, and missing optic nerve assessment in some patients.
items.summary_ja:
背景：2024年版McDonald基準は多発性硬化症（MS）診断の新たな推奨を示すが、その臨床的妥当性は未検証であった。  
方法：2024年1～12月にMS疑いで紹介された347例を後ろ向きに解析。全例が脳・脊髄MRIを含む診断評価を受け、2017年基準は前向きに、2024年基準は診断後および追跡時に後ろ向きに適用した。2017年基準を診断の基準とし、2024年基準の診断数と性能を比較した。  
結果：66％が女性、平均年齢39.4歳。追跡期間平均15.3か月で、21％はMS以外の疾患と判明し除外。残る274例に2024年基準を適用すると、初期診断時のMS診断数は2017年基準の172例に対し220例と増加。2024年基準は放射線学的孤立症候群も含め早期診断を可能にし、年齢層を問わず同等の診断性能を示した。  
結論：2024年McDonald基準はMSの早期診断を促進し、診断数を増加させるが、一部のバイオマーカーや視神経評価の欠如が課題である。
items.summary_short_ja: 2024年版マクドナルド基準は、多発性硬化症（MS）の診断を早期化し、放射線学的孤立症候群患者も含め診断数を増加させることが示された。347例中274例に適用し、2017年基準より多くの患者が初期診断でMSと診断された。基準の診断性能は年齢層を問わず安定しているが、中心静脈徴候やカッパ自由軽鎖のデータ欠如、視神経評価の不足が課題である。
